form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.01) when seventh over 318m at Dubbo in a Grade 4/5. Has two successes and four minors from eight starts from box 1. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (19.01) when seventh over 318m at Dubbo in a Grade 4/5. Has two successes and four minors from eight starts from box 1. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 11 lengths (30.29) behind Flash Ethics in a Grade 5 on April 5. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 11 lengths (30.29) behind Flash Ethics in a Grade 5 on April 5. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start shifted outwards and checked off heels.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 4/5 on April 4 over 431m at this track behind Queen Gout beaten 6 lengths (25.62). Has run blistering time here with a 24.75 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 4/5 on April 4 over 431m at this track behind Queen Gout beaten 6 lengths (25.62). Has run blistering time here with a 24.75 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 340m in 19.81. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 340m at this track at NG level. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 340m in 19.81. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 340m at this track at NG level. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight and lost ground.
Checked off heels entering the first turn.
Was bumped and tightened for room at the start.
Raced tightly along the back straight.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (25.15) at this track, making it two placings on end. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (25.15) at this track, making it two placings on end. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide at the turn into the home straight and came together.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 388m at Gosford in a handy (22.29), beating Tickets Please. Will find this a bit tougher, likely to find this too tough.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 25.10. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 340m. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (17.85) over 300m at Taree Super Track. Will need the right run to feature.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (19.83) over 340m at this track. Capable of a better result.
